questionHtml: Deduce, giving a reason, which of the two methods would be least affected by the chips not having exactly the same mass when used with the different concentrations of acid.
markschemeHtml:
method 2 AND marble is in excess «so a little extra has little effect»

OR

large chips AND marble is in excess «so a little extra has little effect»

OR

method 2 AND HCl is limiting reagent «so a little extra marble has little effect»

OR

large chips AND HCl is limiting reagent «so a little extra marble has little effect»

 

Accept, as a reason, that “as the mass is greater the percentage variation will be lower”.

[1 mark]

meta.title: Deduce, giving a reason, which of the two methods would be least affected by the chips not having exactly the same mass when used with the different concentrations of acid.
breadcrumbLabels: 6.1 Collision theory and rates of reaction
